channel.title: 2026-06-10 AI × Science 文献日报 RSS
channel.description: 2026-06-10 当天筛选出的 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料交叉文献 RSS。

item.title: Fast and Continuous Detection of Single Microwave Photons via Photoassisted Quasiparticle Tunneling to a Superconducting Island
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. Lett.
👤 J. Basset, O. Stanisavljević, J. Gabelli, M. Aprili, and J. Estève
Author(s): J. Basset, O. Stanisavljević, J. Gabelli, M. Aprili, and J. Estève A new mechanism for the detection of individual propagating microwave photons that realizes a microwave analogue of the photoelectric effect could be used for practical applications in quantum information and dark matter search. [Phys. Rev. Lett. 136, 237001] Published Wed Jun 10, 2026
